agentAbility.name: Rampage
agentAbility.description: Brings on a destructive rage, firing faster and surviving any hit with at least 1 HP.

primaryAttack.name: Autoloader
primaryAttack.description: Loads a magazine which can rapidly fire, followed by a longer reload. Most effective at close range.

tankAbilities.name: Harpoon
tankAbilities.description: Launches a chained harpoon that pulls the vehicle toward the hit point and Immobilizes enemy vehicles on impact.

tankAbilities.name: Combat Cage
tankAbilities.description: Deploys hedgehogs around the vehicle to trap enemies in close combat; hedgehogs deal damage when pushed and can be destroyed by reactivating the ability.
